title: Lollipop Chart via a Custom Series Type (Marks)
html:
{{ charts[0] }}
A lollipop is a scalar-y custom series: renderItem draws a stem from scales.y(0) up to the value and caps it with a circle. Marks carry their datum identity, so hover, the shared tooltip and legend toggle work without any extra wiring.
vanilla-js-script: // The registered "lollipop" type is already used by the chart above; this block // keeps sample generation scoped to vanilla-js.
